title.zh: 中医九种体质详解：了解你的体质类型
title.en: Nine TCM Body Types Explained: Know Your Constitution

description.zh: 详解中医九种体质类型的特点、表现和调理方法，帮助你更好地了解自己的体质
description.en: Detailed explanation of nine TCM body types - characteristics, manifestations, and conditioning methods

zh.text: 中医将人体体质分为九种类型，每种体质都有其独特的特点和调理方法。了解自己的体质类型，才能更好地进行养生保健。以下是九种体质的详细介绍：
1. 平和体质 (Balanced Constitution)
这是最健康的体质类型，阴阳气血调和，身体机能正常。

items: 特征：面色红润，精力充沛，睡眠良好，二便正常
性格：开朗乐观，适应能力强
调理：保持均衡饮食，适度运动，规律作息
建议：继续保持健康的生活方式

zh.text: 2. 气虚体质 (Qi Deficiency)
气虚体质的人元气不足，容易疲劳，抵抗力较弱。

items: 特征：面色苍白或萎黄，容易疲劳，气短懒言，自汗
性格：内向，不喜欢运动
易患疾病：感冒、内脏下垂等
调理：补气健脾，多吃黄芪、党参、山药、红枣
运动：温和运动如散步、太极

zh.text: 3. 阳虚体质 (Yang Deficiency)
阳虚体质的人阳气不足，怕冷，手脚冰凉。

items: 特征：面色白，怕冷，手脚冰凉，喜热饮，大便稀溏
性格：沉静内向
易患疾病：寒证、腹泻、水肿等
调理：温阳补肾，多吃羊肉、核桃、韭菜
注意：避免生冷食物，注意保暖

zh.text: 4. 阴虚体质 (Yin Deficiency)
阴虚体质的人阴液不足，容易口干咽燥，手脚心发热。

items: 特征：面色偏红，口干咽燥，手脚心热，盗汗，大便干
性格：急躁易怒
易患疾病：干燥综合征、失眠等
调理：滋阴润燥，多吃银耳、百合、枸杞、梨
注意：避免辛辣燥热食物，保持情绪稳定

zh.text: 5. 血虚体质 (Blood Deficiency)
血虚体质的人血液不足，面色萎黄，头晕心悸。

items: 特征：面色萎黄或苍白，头晕眼花，心悸失眠，月经量少
性格：胆小易惊
易患疾病：贫血、月经不调等
调理：补血养血，多吃当归、红枣、桂圆、黑芝麻
注意：避免过度劳累，保证睡眠

zh.text: 6. 痰湿体质 (Phlegm-Dampness)
痰湿体质的人体内痰湿较重，体型偏胖，容易困倦。

items: 特征：体型肥胖，面部油腻，容易困倦，胸闷痰多
性格：温和稳重
易患疾病：高血压、糖尿病、中风等
调理：化痰祛湿，多吃薏米、冬瓜、陈皮
运动：加强有氧运动，促进代谢

zh.text: 7. 湿热体质 (Damp-Heat)
湿热体质的人体内湿热较重，容易口干口苦，皮肤油腻。

items: 特征：面垢油光，口干口苦，大便粘腻，小便黄
性格：急躁
易患疾病：痤疮、黄疸、泌尿系统感染等
调理：清热利湿，多吃绿豆、苦瓜、薏米
注意：避免辛辣油腻食物，少喝酒

zh.text: 8. 气郁体质 (Qi Stagnation)
气郁体质的人气机郁滞，情绪容易抑郁或焦虑。

items: 特征：面色晦暗，情绪低落，胸闷叹息，食欲不振
性格：敏感多疑，忧郁脆弱
易患疾病：抑郁症、失眠、乳腺疾病等
调理：疏肝解郁，多吃玫瑰花、菊花、柑橘
建议：多参加社交活动，保持心情开朗

zh.text: 9. 特禀体质 (Special Constitution)
特禀体质的人有过敏倾向，对某些物质敏感。

items: 特征：容易过敏，如药物过敏、食物过敏、花粉过敏等
易患疾病：过敏性鼻炎、哮喘、荨麻疹等
调理：增强体质，避免过敏源
注意：饮食清淡，避免已知过敏食物

zh.text: 如何判断自己的体质？
体质判断需要综合考虑多方面因素。建议通过专业的体质测试或咨询中医师来确定自己的体质类型。不同体质的人需要不同的养生方法，辨证施养才能事半功倍。
温馨提示：体质判断仅供参考，不能替代医疗诊断。如有健康问题，请咨询专业中医师。体质也可能随时间和环境变化，需要动态调整养生方案。

en.text: TCM divides human constitution into nine types, each with unique characteristics and conditioning methods. Understanding your body type enables better wellness care. Here's a detailed introduction to the nine body types:
1. Balanced Constitution (Pinghe)
The healthiest constitution type with harmonious Yin-Yang and Qi-Blood, normal body functions.

items: Features: Rosy complexion, energetic, good sleep, normal bowel movements
Personality: Cheerful, optimistic, adaptable
Conditioning: Balanced diet, moderate exercise, regular routine
Advice: Continue healthy lifestyle

en.text: 2. Qi Deficiency (Qixu)
People with Qi deficiency lack vital energy, easily fatigued, weaker immunity.

items: Features: Pale complexion, easy fatigue, short breath, spontaneous sweating
Personality: Introverted, dislikes exercise
Prone to: Colds, organ prolapse
Conditioning: Tonify Qi, strengthen spleen - eat astragalus, codonopsis, yam, red dates
Exercise: Gentle activities like walking, Tai Chi

en.text: 3. Yang Deficiency (Yangxu)
People with Yang deficiency lack Yang energy, fear cold, cold hands and feet.

items: Features: Pale face, fear cold, cold extremities, prefer hot drinks, loose stool
Personality: Quiet, introverted
Prone to: Cold syndromes, diarrhea, edema
Conditioning: Warm Yang, tonify kidney - eat lamb, walnut, chives
Note: Avoid raw/cold foods, stay warm

en.text: 4. Yin Deficiency (Yinxu)
People with Yin deficiency lack Yin fluids, prone to dryness, warm palms/soles.

items: Features: Reddish complexion, dry mouth/throat, warm palms/soles, night sweats
Personality: Impatient, irritable
Prone to: Dryness syndromes, insomnia
Conditioning: Nourish Yin - eat tremella, lily bulb, goji, pear
Note: Avoid spicy/drying foods, maintain emotional stability

en.text: 5. Blood Deficiency (Xuexu)
People with Blood deficiency lack blood, sallow complexion, dizziness, palpitations.

items: Features: Sallow complexion, dizziness, palpitations, insomnia, scanty menstruation
Personality: Timid, easily startled
Prone to: Anemia, menstrual irregularities
Conditioning: Tonify Blood - eat angelica, red dates, longan, black sesame
Note: Avoid overexertion, ensure adequate sleep

en.text: 6. Phlegm-Dampness (Tanshi)
People with phlegm-dampness have heavy dampness, overweight, prone to drowsiness.

items: Features: Overweight, oily face, easy drowsiness, chest tightness
Personality: Gentle, steady
Prone to: Hypertension, diabetes, stroke
Conditioning: Resolve phlegm-dampness - eat coix seed, winter melon, tangerine peel
Exercise: Aerobic exercise to promote metabolism

en.text: 7. Damp-Heat (Shire)
People with damp-heat have heavy damp-heat, prone to bitter taste, oily skin.

items: Features: Oily face, bitter taste, sticky stool, yellow urine
Personality: Impatient
Prone to: Acne, jaundice, urinary infections
Conditioning: Clear heat, resolve dampness - eat mung beans, bitter melon, coix seed
Note: Avoid spicy/greasy foods, limit alcohol

en.text: 8. Qi Stagnation (Qiyu)
People with Qi stagnation have blocked Qi flow, prone to depression or anxiety.

items: Features: Dull complexion, low mood, chest tightness, sighing
Personality: Sensitive, suspicious, melancholic
Prone to: Depression, insomnia, breast conditions
Conditioning: Soothe liver, resolve stagnation - eat rose, chrysanthemum, citrus
Advice: Participate in social activities, stay cheerful

en.text: 9. Special Constitution (Tebing)
People with special constitution have allergic tendencies, sensitive to certain substances.

items: Features: Easy allergies - drug, food, pollen allergies
Prone to: Allergic rhinitis, asthma, hives
Conditioning: Strengthen constitution, avoid allergens
Note: Light diet, avoid known allergenic foods

en.text: How to Determine Your Body Type?

Body type determination requires comprehensive consideration. Use professional body type tests or consult a TCM practitioner. Different constitutions need different wellness methods - pattern-based conditioning yields best results.

Note: Body type determination is for reference only, not replacing medical diagnosis. Consult a qualified TCM practitioner for health concerns. Constitution may change over time and environment, requiring dynamic adjustment of wellness plans.
